title: Twilight Lib
description: A library mod for mc_jojo3's mods.
body:
Twilight Lib is a library mod used by mc_jojo3's mods.

While my mods would probably still work fine without it, I would still recommend using it as things may break or not work as intended without it.

Why use a library mod?

Library mods, such as this one, provide significant advantages for both players and mod developers. Their primary benefit is enabling multiple mods to share common code, reducing development and maintenance time. Additionally, because library mods are widely tested across different environments and communities, they often contribute to improved stability, fewer bugs, and better overall performance.

This means that Twilight Lib is designed to more easily allow me to synchronize and build compatibility systems between my different mods and is in no way meant to be used in any other ways, if anyone (which I doubt) find this mod useful in other aspects feel free to use it.

Functionalities:
  • CreRaces
  • Pehkui (Verifies installation)
  • MGR:R (Mine Gear Rising: Revengeance)
  • Clash of Fates
  • RogueCraft
  • EnviroMine Lite
  • Masks of Terror
  • Vigor
